_metadata.description: Character appearance seed data for G.I. Joe Movies (2009-2021) — movie-original characters and ARAH shared characters in live-action films

data.name: Rex Lewis (Rise of Cobra)
data.description: Joseph Gordon-Levitt as Cobra Commander's origin identity. Initially seen in flashbacks as clean-cut young soldier, later transformed into disfigured mad scientist 'The Doctor' wearing breathing apparatus and dark robes. Eventually dons iconic chrome Cobra Commander mask
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

data.name: Akiko (Snake Eyes: G.I. Joe Origins)
data.description: Haruka Abe as head of security for the Arashikage clan. Athletic Japanese woman in traditional clan training garb mixed with modern tactical elements. Stern, disciplined warrior with katana and clan loyalty

data.name: Kenta (Snake Eyes: G.I. Joe Origins)
data.description: Takehiro Hira as exiled Arashikage clan member turned yakuza boss. Japanese man in expensive dark suits with menacing presence. Uses criminal underworld connections to pursue clan secrets. Allied with Cobra

data.name: Sen (Snake Eyes: G.I. Joe Origins)
data.description: Eri Ishida as elder of the Arashikage clan. Elderly Japanese woman in traditional clan robes with dignified bearing. Wise matriarch who oversees the clan's ancient trials and guards their mystical jewel

data.name: Mouse (Retaliation)
data.description: Joseph Mazzello as young G.I. Joe tech specialist. Slim young man in military fatigues with tech equipment. Brief appearance before the Joe team ambush. Modern military support role

data.name: Duke (Rise of Cobra)
data.description: Channing Tatum as elite soldier recruited into G.I. Joe. Clean-cut muscular build in black accelerator suit and later standard military tactical gear. Young idealistic leader with personal connection to Baroness
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

data.name: Snake Eyes (Rise of Cobra)
data.description: Ray Park as silent ninja commando in sleek all-black tactical bodysuit with molded muscle detail and full face visor. Athletic build with dual katanas and modern weaponry. Mute warrior with rubber-suit tactical design
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

data.name: Scarlett (Rise of Cobra)
data.description: Rachel Nichols as counter-intelligence specialist with red hair. Athletic build in black tactical bodysuit and accelerator suit. Armed with crossbow and modern weapons. Intelligent and capable fighter
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

data.name: General Hawk (Rise of Cobra)
data.description: Dennis Quaid as G.I. Joe commanding general. Older distinguished military officer in dark tactical uniform with general's insignia. Authoritative bearing with graying hair. Commands the Pit underground base
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

data.name: Heavy Duty (Rise of Cobra)
data.description: Adewale Akinnuoye-Agbaje as heavy weapons specialist. Large muscular African British soldier in dark tactical gear carrying heavy ordnance. Second-in-command at the Pit base. Imposing physical presence
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

data.name: Breaker (Rise of Cobra)
data.description: Said Taghmaoui as communications and tech specialist. Slim build in dark tactical uniform with multiple computer screens and tech equipment. Moroccan-French characterization with bubble gum habit. Provides tech support from the Pit
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

data.name: Cover Girl (Rise of Cobra)
data.description: Karolina Kurkova as tank specialist and Hawk's aide. Tall athletic woman in dark military uniform. Brief supporting role at the Pit headquarters. Modern military professional design
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

data.name: Cobra Commander (Rise of Cobra)
data.description: Joseph Gordon-Levitt in final transformed state wearing chrome cobra-shaped face mask over scarred features and dark blue military uniform. Revealed as Rex Lewis after his transformation via nanomite technology
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

data.name: Destro (Rise of Cobra)
data.description: Christopher Eccleston as James McCullen, M.A.R.S. Industries CEO. Initially distinguished businessman in dark suits, later gains signature silver metal face after nanomite punishment. Scottish accent with imposing bearing
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

data.name: Baroness (Rise of Cobra)
data.description: Sienna Miller as Ana Lewis/Baroness in tight black leather bodysuit with signature glasses and long dark hair. Athletic build with sci-fi weapons. Under nanomite mind control, revealed as Duke's former fiancee
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

data.name: Storm Shadow (Rise of Cobra)
data.description: Byung-hun Lee as Cobra ninja assassin in all-white tactical suit. Athletic build with dual katanas and martial arts expertise. Korean actor bringing intense physicality. Flashbacks show rivalry with Snake Eyes in Arashikage dojo
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

data.name: Zartan (Rise of Cobra)
data.description: Arnold Vosloo as master of disguise using nanomite technology to perfectly replicate any person's appearance. Initially bald scarred man in dark clothing. Infiltrates the highest levels of government by impersonating the President
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

data.name: Dr. Mindbender (Rise of Cobra)
data.description: Kevin J. O'Connor as Cobra scientist in white lab coat. Thin nervous build with glasses. Brief appearance as Rex Lewis's research colleague. Modern military scientist design without ARAH's bare-chested look
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

data.name: Roadblock (Retaliation)
data.description: Dwayne Johnson as heavy weapons specialist and team leader. Massively muscular build in dark tactical gear with heavy machine gun. Shaved head with goatee. Becomes de facto Joe leader after team decimation. Charismatic and physically dominant

data.name: Snake Eyes (Retaliation)
data.description: Ray Park returning as silent ninja in updated all-black tactical suit with more armored design. Full face visor with angular modern look. Carries katana and infiltrates Cobra mountain fortress. Leads ninja assault on cliffside

data.name: Jinx (Retaliation)
data.description: Elodie Yung as blind ninja warrior in red and yellow tactical suit. Athletic build with dual swords. Works alongside Snake Eyes to capture Storm Shadow from the mountain fortress. Acrobatic fight choreography

data.name: Flint (Retaliation)
data.description: D.J. Cotrona as young Joe soldier. Athletic build in dark military tactical gear. Survives the team ambush alongside Roadblock and Lady Jaye. Modern military operator design without signature beret

data.name: Lady Jaye (Retaliation)
data.description: Adrianne Palicki as covert operations specialist. Athletic woman in dark tactical gear and civilian disguises. Skilled in undercover work and combat. Key role in exposing Zartan's presidential impersonation

data.name: Cobra Commander (Retaliation)
data.description: Luke Bracey (under mask) as Cobra leader in updated chrome helmet with blue-tinted visor and dark blue military coat with high collar. Imposing presence freed from underground prison. More traditionally villain-styled than Rise of Cobra

data.name: Storm Shadow (Retaliation)
data.description: Byung-hun Lee returning as white-clad ninja. Revealed to have survived Rise of Cobra. White tactical suit with more traditional ninja elements. Shifts allegiance after learning truth about his master's murder

data.name: Zartan (Retaliation)
data.description: Jonathan Pryce as Zartan impersonating the U.S. President. Distinguished older man in presidential attire with subtle menacing undertones. Uses position to order destruction of G.I. Joe team and advance Cobra's global domination plan

data.name: Firefly (Retaliation)
data.description: Ray Stevenson as Cobra saboteur and explosives expert. Large muscular build in dark tactical gear with face mask. Uses explosive firefly-shaped micro-drones. Ruthless mercenary who frees Cobra Commander from prison

data.name: Snake Eyes (Snake Eyes: G.I. Joe Origins)
data.description: Henry Golding as the origin story of Snake Eyes. Young athletic man of mixed heritage in civilian clothes transitioning to traditional Arashikage training garb and eventually the iconic black ninja suit. Seeking revenge for his father's murder

data.name: Storm Shadow (Snake Eyes: G.I. Joe Origins)
data.description: Andrew Koji as Tommy Arashikage, heir to the Arashikage clan. Athletic Japanese man in traditional clan training garb transitioning to white ninja suit. Initially Snake Eyes' ally and sworn brother before bitter betrayal leads him toward Cobra

data.name: Baroness (Snake Eyes: G.I. Joe Origins)
data.description: Ursula Corbero as Cobra operative in sleek dark tactical outfit with signature glasses and dark hair. Athletic build with modern weapons. Recruiting Kenta and pursuing Arashikage clan secrets for Cobra

data.name: Scarlett (Snake Eyes: G.I. Joe Origins)
data.description: Samara Weaving as G.I. Joe operative with red hair in modern tactical gear. Athletic build with crossbow and firearms. Investigating Cobra's activities in Japan. Brief but impactful role establishing the Joe organization
